title: Pukka Pad Pastel A4 Project Book, Pack of 3, Assorted Colours
features: Bright and Beautiful: Combine designs with your Pukka Pad binders, folders, and other office and school supplies from the pastel collection, featuring soft, beautiful designs to make your projects a work of art.

Notebook Reimagined: Take your notebook to the next level with the Pukka Pad Project Books, a revolutionary take on the classic notebook that introduces repositionable dividers, allowing you to efficiently manage multiple school subjects and work projects in a single space.
Thick and Sturdy Sheets: Each journal features 200 pages of 80GSM paper to prevent ghosting and bleeding with perforated margins, making them easy to tear out, turn in work, or pass notes in class.

Office Essential: From project managers to college students and media reporters, everyone needs a set of cute, reliable, and fashion-forward notepads to show colleagues and clients how professional and organized you are.

Multi-Pack of Notebooks: Available in the convenient A4 size, you get the best pack of 3 notebooks for your professional memos, informal ideas, and doodles, which fit perfectly into your backpack, locker, or desk.
description: From the manufacturer More About The Products Ideal for people who make notes on the go.Compact with head bound wiring.
